top_signals.title: Emerging-Market Stocks Rise Most in Two Months on AI Dip-Buying
top_signals.summary: Emerging-market stocks rebounded, led by South Korea, as investors snapped up artificial intelligence shares at lower prices after Monday’s selloff. Developing-nation currencies advanced after Iran and Israel paused hostilities.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Citi’s Chew Sees Aggressive Short-Selling Positions in US Stocks
top_signals.summary: Traders are aggressively building short-selling positions in US stocks, while bullish wagers on the tech sector remain stretched, putting the market at risk, according to Citigroup Inc. strategists.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Trump Gets Booed at NBA Finals (Video)
Ericsson, Epiroc expand alliance to accelerate mining automation
top_signals.summary: Under the agreement, Epiroc will offer Ericsson’s LTE and 5G connectivity solutions as part of its digital portfolio for both surface and underground mines.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
